meaning: [微]柯萨奇病毒(一种引起呼吸道疾病等的病毒)[首先发现于美国纽约州的Coxsackie镇,故名]
examples: The most common viral agent is Coxsackie B.
Coxsackie B virus is also a common virus, most prominently affecting children.
Coxsackie virus; multiple organs and multiple systems disfunction; Young child.
Two of seven cultures sent back to Atlanta for testing have been confirmed as Coxsackie B.
This particular strain of Coxsackie B causes myocarditis, or inflammation of the heart.
